batch_routes.description: 20 regular tiles — readability, distinctness, art style compliance
batch_routes.model_reason: Codex CLI default is multimodal and satisfies high-risk batch requirements for tile distinguishability at 128x128px and silhouette recognition.

batch_routes.description: 5 special tactical tiles — unique marker verification, no overlap with regular tile visual vocabulary
batch_routes.model_reason: High-risk: each special tile must display a visually unique mechanic marker not shared with any regular tile. Multimodal codex-default satisfies requirement.

batch_routes.description: 35 expression PNGs (7 chars × 5 emotions) — identity consistency across emotions per character
batch_routes.model_reason: High-risk: same character must look like same person across 5 emotions; emotions must be distinguishable. Codex-default multimodal handles this.

batch_routes.description: 10 portrait PNGs — crop discipline (face+shoulder), centering, art style
batch_routes.model_reason: Medium-risk: portrait crop is verifiable per-image. Codex-default is sufficient.

batch_routes.description: 15 char_gicho frame animation PNGs — loop closure (idle 4f), motion progression (wave 4f, happy 4f, surprised 3f)
batch_routes.model_reason: High-risk: frame continuity and loop closure are sequential visual questions requiring side-by-side frame comparison. Codex-default multimodal handles this.

batch_routes.description: Cross-family style coherence — tiles vs character expressions vs portraits share same palette/style world
batch_routes.model_reason: High-risk: Japanese healing island aesthetic must be consistent across all asset families. Requires comparing representative assets side by side.
